tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Yeah
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
Well, it's a long way from Star, Mississippi[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
To the big stage I'm singing on tonight[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
And sometimes the butterflies still get me[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
When I'm in the spotlight[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
And some people seem to think that I've changed[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
That I'm different than I was back then[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
But in my soul, I know that I'm the same way[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
That I've really always been[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
'Cause a Mississippi girl don't change her ways[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]
Just 'cause everybody knows her name[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Ain't big headed from a little bit of fame[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
I still like wearing my old ball cap[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
Riding my kids around piggy back[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                 [ch]G[/ch]
They might know me all around the world[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
But, y'all, I'm still a Mississippi girl[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] (X2)
Woo![/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
Well, I spent a few weeks in California[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
They put my face on the big movie screen[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
But that don't mean I've forgotten where I came from[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
That's just me chasing dreams[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]
'Cause a Mississippi girl don't change her ways[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]A[/ch]
Just 'cause everybody knows her name[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Ain't big headed from a little bit of fame[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
I still like wearing my old ball cap[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
Riding my kids around piggy back[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                 [ch]G[/ch]
They might know me all around the world[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
But, y'all, I'm still a Mississippi girl[/tab]

Woo!
[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                [ch]A[/ch]
'Cause a Mississippi girl don't change her ways[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]A[/ch]
Just 'cause everybody knows her name[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Ain't big headed from a little bit of fame[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
Still like wearing my old ball cap[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
Riding my kids around piggy back[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                  [ch]G[/ch]
They might know me all around this world[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
But, y'all, I'm still a Mississippi, girl[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
Mississippi girl![/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Oh oh[/tab]

Mississippi girl![/tab]

Mississippi girl![/tab]
